title: BNK.RLVR.RVT.CHN.001.DASHBOARD_VIEWED — A beneficiary has consulted their dashboard
description: Resource-event payload emitted by AGG.CHN.001.DSH.BENEFICIARY_DASHBOARD when CMD.CHN.001.DSH.RECORD_DASHBOARD_VIEW is accepted outside the 30-second server-side debounce window (INV.DSH.004). Carries a PII-free snapshot of the beneficiary's progression at the moment of consultation, suitable for engagement analytics in the DATA_ANALYTIQUE zone. STRICT PII EXCLUSION (INV.DSH.001): no name, no contact information, no geolocation. case_id is opaque; downstream consumers MUST resolve identity via BNK.RLVR.CAP.SUP.002.BEN if needed (the beneficiary identity anchor was relocated from BNK.RLVR.CAP.REF.001 to BNK.RLVR.CAP.SUP.002 per ADR-BCM-FUNC-0016).

event_id.description: Globally unique identifier of this resource event. Used by downstream consumers as their idempotency key.

occurred_at.description: Server-side timestamp at which the BFF accepted the underlying RECORD_DASHBOARD_VIEW command. Canonical wall-clock for this event.

case_id.description: CORRELATION KEY. Opaque participation case identifier. Identity resolution to BNK.RLVR.OBJ.SUP.002.BENEFICIARY_RECORD.internal_id is delegated to consumers via BNK.RLVR.CAP.SUP.002.BEN.

current_tier_code.description: Tier code displayed to the beneficiary at the moment of consultation. Optional — null when the aggregate has never received a tier event for this case.

current_score.description: Behavioural score displayed at the moment of consultation. Optional — null when the aggregate has never received a score event for this case.

client_context.description: Optional, PII-free client-side metadata propagated from the original RECORD_DASHBOARD_VIEW command.
